title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§602.  Budget to include additional salary

The governing authority of the parish of St. Landry shall annually, and at the time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:601.
doc_text:
§602.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of the parish of St. Landry shall annually, and at the time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:601.
